zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Littlefield於1697年7月20日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克威爾斯時，她的父親David Littlefield37歲，母親Mary Mercy Hill28歲。她於1715年12月15日與Daniel David Morrison III在美國緬因州約克結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1756年7月4日在她的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在美國緬因州約克威爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Littlefield于1697年7月20日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克威爾斯时，她的父亲David Littlefield37岁，母亲Mary Mercy Hill28岁。她于1715年12月15日与Daniel David Morrison III在美国缅因州約克结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1756年7月4日在她的家乡享年58岁，埋葬在美国缅因州約克威爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: Littlefield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Littlefield Green in White Waltham, Berkshire. The placename derives from Old English lȳtel ‘little’ + feld ‘open country’.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Littlefield was born on 20 July 1697, in Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, David Littlefield, was 37 and her mother, Mary Mercy Hill, was 28. She married Daniel David Morrison III on 15 December 1715, in York, Maine, United States. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 4 July 1756, in her hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in Wells, York, Maine, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Littlefield est née le 20 juillet 1697, à Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, David Littlefield, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mary Mercy Hill, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Daniel David Morrison III le 15 décembre 1715, à York, Maine, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 juillet 1756, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Wells, York, Maine, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Littlefield am 20. Juli 1697 in Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater David Littlefield 37 und ihre Mutter Mary Mercy Hill 28. Sie hat am 15. Dezember 1715 in York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten Daniel David Morrison III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Juli 1756 im Alter von 58 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Wells, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Littlefield è nata il il 20 luglio 1697 nel Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, David Littlefield, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Mary Mercy Hill, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Daniel David Morrison III il 15 dicembre 1715, nel York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 4 luglio 1756, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Wells, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Littlefieldが1697年7月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークウエルズで生まれた時，父David Littlefieldは37歳，母Mary Mercy Hillは28歳であった。1715年12月15日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークでDaniel David Morrison IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1756年7月4日に故郷で58歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークウエルズにて埋葬された。

ko.Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 웰스
ko.York, Province of Maine, British Colonia: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 프로빈스 프 맹 요르크
ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Littlefield(이)가 1697년 7월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 웰스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 David Littlefield(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Mercy Hill(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1715년 12월 15일 미국 메인 주 요르크에서 Daniel David Morrison III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1756년 7월 4일 그녀의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 메인 주 요르크 웰스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Littlefield nasceu em 20 de julho de 1697, em Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, David Littlefield, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Mary Mercy Hill, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Daniel David Morrison III em 15 de dezembro de 1715, em York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de julho de 1756, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Littlefield родилась 20 июля 1697 г. в местности веллс, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени David Littlefield было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Mercy Hill, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Daniel David Morrison III 15 декабря 1715 г. в местности ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 4 июля 1756 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности веллс, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Littlefield nació el 20 de julio de 1697, en Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, David Littlefield, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Mary Mercy Hill, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Daniel David Morrison III el 15 de diciembre de 1715, en York, Maine, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 4 de julio de 1756, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos.
